title: Korean Puffed Pepper Wrap
description: A Chinese-inspired dish featuring a crispy puffed pepper wrap filled with spicy Korean chili flakes and crunchy vegetables.
instructions: Preheat a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add a small amount of oil and cook the sliced bell peppers until tender.
Add the sliced cucumbers, carrots, and green onions to the skillet and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
In a small bowl, mix together the Korean chili flakes and a pinch of salt.
Add the chili flake mixture to the skillet and stir to combine.
Warm the puffed pepper wraps in the microwave for 10-15 seconds.
Assemble the wraps by placing a portion of the vegetable mixture onto each wrap.
